case_title: HARB, LEVY & WEILAND VS CHOW, ANDY DBA IMPACT TECHCOMM, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHOW, ANDY DBA IMPACT TECHCOMM, INC.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO ANDY CHOW DBA IMPACT TECHCOMM, INC RETURNED--ATTEMPTED, NOT KNOWN; NO SUCH NUMBER

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,725.00 FILED BY HARB, LEVY & WEILAND AS TO DEFENDANT CHOW, ANDY DBA IMPACT TECHCOMM, INC. SHEK, MICHAEL DBA IMPACT TECHCOMM, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-05-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARB, LEVY & WEILAND IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHOW, ANDY DBA IMPACT TECHCOMM, INC. SHEK, MICHAEL DBA IMPACT TECHCOMM, INC. MICHAEL SHEK DBA IMPACT TECHCOMM, INC IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT SHEK IS DISMISSED BECAUSE NO PROOF OF SERVICE WAS FILED. JUDGMENT IS IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT CHOW BECAUSE THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS HAS RUN. CCP 339. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
